tagline.zh: 单个 HTML 文件，一次生成一款《我的世界》式的可玩 3D 体素世界。
tagline.en: A playable Minecraft-style 3D voxel world, generated as a single HTML file in one shot.

prompt.zh:
你是一个顶级的资深游戏开发者。请为我使用单 HTML5 和 Canvas（或 Three.js）编写一个《我的世界》克隆版。请包含以下核心功能：

1. 一个基于柏林噪声（Perlin Noise）生成的无限或可滚动的 3D 地形。
2. 第一人称视角，支持使用 WASD 移动和鼠标环视。
3. 支持至少 3 种方块类型（如：泥土、草地、石头等），并支持鼠标左键破坏方块，右键放置方块。材质要尽可能还原。
4. 要有一个内置的、极其丰富的神话幻想中的建筑和地形等，由你自行设计。
prompt.en:
You are a top-tier veteran game developer. Build me a Minecraft clone using a single HTML5 file and Canvas (or Three.js). Include the following core features:

1. An infinite or scrollable 3D terrain generated from Perlin noise.
2. A first-person view with WASD movement and mouse look.
3. At least 3 block types (e.g. dirt, grass, stone), with left-click to break and right-click to place blocks. Keep the textures as faithful as possible.
4. A built-in, extremely rich set of mythic-fantasy buildings and terrain, designed at your own discretion.

tagline.zh: 经典 SVG 测评题：让模型用代码「画」出一只骑自行车的鹈鹕。
tagline.en: The classic SVG eval: make the model "draw" a pelican riding a bicycle, in code.

prompt.zh: 制作一个逼真的、生动的、在海边骑着自行车的鹈鹕 <svg>
prompt.en: Create a realistic, lively <svg> of a pelican riding a bicycle by the sea.

tagline.zh: 单个 HTML 文件，一次生成一只可旋转、可爆炸视图的 3D 镂空机械腕表，机芯全可见。
tagline.en: A single HTML file: a rotatable, exploded-view 3D skeleton mechanical watch with a fully visible movement, generated in one shot.

prompt.zh:
创建一个精美、高细节的交互式 3D 镂空机械表。

核心要求：
• 完全可见的复杂机芯：包括主发条、齿轮系、带游丝的摆轮、擒纵机构、夹板、红宝石轴承等。
• 真实的金属材质、蓝宝石水晶玻璃、反射、阴影，以及奢华腕表摄影级别的照明效果。
• 荧光指针与刻度。
• 交互式控制：支持旋转手表、切换爆炸视图、悬停/点击时高亮显示的零件标签、机芯信息面板。
• 流畅的动画，达到专业级产品展示质量。
• 深色优雅背景，带有细微的反射效果。

在一次回复中尽可能真实且令人惊叹地完成。输出为一个完整的、自包含的单 HTML 文件，使用 Three.js (CDN)，所有代码均采用内联形式。
prompt.en:
Create an exquisite, highly detailed, interactive 3D skeleton mechanical watch.

Core requirements:
• A fully visible, complex movement: mainspring, gear train, balance wheel with hairspring, escapement, bridges, ruby bearings, and so on.
• Realistic metal materials, sapphire crystal glass, reflections, shadows, and luxury-watch photography-grade lighting.
• Luminous hands and markers.
• Interactive controls: rotate the watch, toggle an exploded view, part labels highlighted on hover/click, and a movement info panel.
• Smooth animation at professional product-showcase quality.
• A dark, elegant background with subtle reflections.

Make it as realistic and stunning as possible in a single response. Output a complete, self-contained single HTML file using Three.js (CDN), with all code inline.

tagline.zh: React + three.js 从零手写的 3D 第一人称射击原型，复刻 Dust2 的 5v5 对战。
tagline.en: A from-scratch 3D FPS in React + three.js: a 5v5 battle on a rebuilt Dust2.

prompt.zh:
用 **React + TypeScript + three.js** 从零开发一个可在浏览器直接运行的 3D 第一人称射击原型：复刻 Dust2 核心区域的 5v5 对战。你可以自行搭建项目、安装依赖、运行调试并迭代，直到它能正常游玩。

## 交付形式

- 一个标准 **Vite + React 18 + TypeScript** 项目，含完整 `package.json`、`vite.config.ts`、`index.html`、`src/`，`npm install && npm run dev` 即可打开游玩。
- **不使用任何外部资产文件**（3D 模型、贴图、音频一律不用）。地图、角色、武器全部在代码里用几何体 procedural 生成，声音用 Web Audio 程序化合成。第三方库只用 three / react / react-dom；寻路、状态机、物理、渲染循环都自己实现，不引入现成游戏引擎。

## 1. Dust2 地图

在 3D 世界里搭出空间尺度合理的 Dust2 经典区域，**必须完整包含**：T 出生点、CT 出生点、A大、A点、中门（含可穿过的中门门体）、猫道、B洞、B点，并保证这些区域按 Dust2 的实际走位彼此连通。要么全部包含，不要交出缺区域的残缺版本。所有墙体、箱子都有物理碰撞，玩家和 AI 都无法穿墙。

## 2. 角色

在没有外部模型的前提下，用代码搭出**类人型角色**：必须有独立的头、躯干、双臂、双腿——**严禁用胶囊体或圆柱体等基础几何体敷衍成一根柱子**。CT 与 T 两个阵营在外观上要能一眼区分，角色默认是持枪姿态，武器随角色朝向移动。

## 3. 武器系统

做一套可扩展的武器数据系统，支持在主武器 / 副武器 / 近战之间切换，并有对应的第一人称手持模型。至少还原以下手感差异：

- **AK-47**：高伤害，开火后坐力剧烈（准星扩散 + 视角上扬明显）。
- **M4A4**：中等伤害，后坐力低，射速高。
- **AWP**：单发致命，射速极低，**右键开镜**（3D 视野拉近 + 2D 瞄准镜遮罩覆盖）。
- **手枪**：至少 Glock（T 默认）、USP（CT 默认）、沙鹰，用于手枪局；伤害低于步枪、沙鹰介于两者之间且弹匣小。
- **近战刀**。

命中判定按 **Hitbox 分区**（头 / 胸 / 腹 / 手臂 / 腿），伤害各不相同，**爆头伤害是身体的两倍**。有护甲时按护甲减伤。

## 4. 手枪局

支持"手枪局"开局：全员只带默认手枪、没有主武器、护甲按手枪局配置。这是标准 CS 的第一回合形态。

## 5. C4 炸弹与回合胜负

- 回合开始时 C4 交给某个 T；持包者阵亡后炸弹掉落，可被其他 T 捡起。
- **下包**：持包 T 在 A点或 B点范围内可安放 C4，安放后进入倒计时。
- **拆包**：CT 站在已安放的 C4 处，持续一段时间完成拆除。
- **回合结算**：T 清空 CT、或 C4 爆炸 → T 胜；CT 清空 T（且未下包）、或成功拆包 → CT 胜。
- 玩家操控的角色阵亡后，可切换到存活队友的视角 / 接管其操控（bot）。

## 6. 5v5 AI 战场

场上共 10 人：1 名玩家 + 4 名 AI 队友，对抗 5 名 AI 敌人，分属 CT / T 两阵营。AI 需要：能在地图内自主寻路巡逻、不卡墙；有视野索敌判定（被墙挡住看不见）；遭遇敌方阵营自动开火交战；并参与 C4 的下包 / 拆包流程（进攻方推包安放、防守方前往拆除）。

## 7. 操作与 HUD

- 流畅的第一人称控制：WASD 移动、空格跳跃、指针锁定鼠标转视角。
- 现代 2D UI 覆盖层：十字准星、生命值 / 护甲、动态弹药面板（开火递减、换弹恢复）、右上角实时击杀播报（Killfeed）。
- **小地图（minimap）**：常驻显示 Dust2 俯视轮廓，实时标出自己、队友、被看见的敌人的点位，以及 C4 的位置。

## 8. 声音

游戏要有音效反馈。由于不使用外部音频文件，用 **Web Audio API 程序化合成** 声音即可。至少包含：不同武器的开火声（AK / M4 / AWP / 手枪要有区分）、换弹声、脚步声、AWP 开镜声、命中反馈音、C4 安放 / 拆除 / 爆炸声，以及击杀提示音。

## 架构要求

这是工业级挑战。你要独立完成技术选型、架构设计、数据结构封装，以及渲染循环、物理帧更新、React 状态生命周期三者之间的数据同步。全局状态引擎、武器系统、AI 状态机、3D 渲染与物理组件等关键系统都要真正实现，而非留空占位。
prompt.en:
Build a browser-playable 3D first-person shooter prototype from scratch using **React + TypeScript + three.js**: a 5v5 battle recreating the core areas of Dust2. You may set up the project, install dependencies, run, debug and iterate until it is properly playable.

## Deliverable

- A standard **Vite + React 18 + TypeScript** project with a complete `package.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `index.html` and `src/`; `npm install && npm run dev` opens it to play.
- **No external asset files whatsoever** (no 3D models, textures or audio). The map, characters and weapons are all generated procedurally from geometry in code, and sound is synthesized programmatically with Web Audio. The only third-party libraries are three / react / react-dom; pathfinding, state machines, physics and the render loop are all implemented yourself, with no off-the-shelf game engine.

## 1. Dust2 map

Build the classic Dust2 areas at a sensible spatial scale in the 3D world, and you **must fully include**: T spawn, CT spawn, Long A, A site, Mid (with a passable set of Mid Doors), Catwalk, B tunnels and B site, connected to one another along Dust2's real routes. Include them all — do not submit a partial version missing areas. All walls and boxes have physical collision; neither players nor AI can pass through walls.

## 2. Characters

With no external models, build **humanoid characters** in code: each must have a distinct head, torso, both arms and both legs — **do NOT cheat with a capsule or cylinder as a single column body**. The CT and T teams must be distinguishable at a glance; characters default to a weapon-holding pose and the weapon moves with the character's facing.

## 3. Weapon system

Build an extensible weapon data system supporting switching between primary / secondary / melee, each with its own first-person held model. Reproduce at least these handling differences:

- **AK-47**: high damage, heavy recoil after firing (pronounced crosshair spread + upward view kick).
- **M4A4**: medium damage, low recoil, high fire rate.
- **AWP**: one-shot lethal, very low fire rate, **right-click to scope** (3D zoom-in + a 2D scope overlay).
- **Pistols**: at least Glock (T default), USP (CT default) and Deagle for pistol rounds; lower damage than rifles, Deagle in between with a small magazine.
- **A melee knife**.

Hit detection uses **hitbox zones** (head / chest / stomach / arm / leg) with different damage each, and **headshot damage is twice body damage**. Armor reduces damage when present.

## 4. Pistol round

Support a "pistol round" opening: everyone carries only their default pistol, no primary weapon, armor per pistol-round rules. This is the standard CS first round.

## 5. C4 bomb and round win/loss

- At round start the C4 is given to a T; when the carrier dies the bomb drops and can be picked up by another T.
- **Plant**: a T carrying the bomb can plant the C4 within the A or B site, starting a countdown after planting.
- **Defuse**: a CT standing at a planted C4 defuses it over a set time.
- **Round resolution**: T wins by eliminating all CTs or the C4 exploding; CT wins by eliminating all Ts (with no plant) or by successfully defusing.
- After your controlled character dies, you can switch to a living teammate's view / take over that bot.

## 6. 5v5 AI battlefield

Ten players on the field: 1 human player + 4 AI teammates against 5 AI enemies, split into CT / T teams. The AI must: navigate and patrol the map autonomously without getting stuck on walls; have line-of-sight target detection (blocked by walls); automatically open fire on the enemy team on contact; and take part in the C4 plant / defuse flow (attackers push and plant, defenders go to defuse).

## 7. Controls and HUD

- Smooth first-person controls: WASD movement, space to jump, pointer-locked mouse to look.
- A modern 2D UI overlay: crosshair, health / armor, a dynamic ammo panel (decrements on fire, restored on reload), and a live kill feed in the top-right.
- A **minimap**: a persistent top-down Dust2 outline marking your own, teammates' and visible enemies' positions in real time, plus the C4's location.

## 8. Sound

The game needs sound feedback. Since no external audio files are used, synthesize sound programmatically with the **Web Audio API**. Include at least: distinct firing sounds per weapon (AK / M4 / AWP / pistols differentiated), reload, footsteps, AWP scope-in, hit feedback, C4 plant / defuse / explosion, and a kill sound.

## Architecture

This is an industrial-grade challenge. You own the technology choices, architecture, and data-structure design, plus the data sync between the render loop, the physics frame update, and the React state lifecycle. The global state engine, weapon system, AI state machine, and 3D-rendering and physics components must be genuinely implemented, not left as placeholders.
